summary: Added empty-string validation guard for PipelineName in RenderPastePipeline, consistent with existing guards for AppName and middleware Name. A dedicated test exercises the new error path. All tests pass with 100% coverage, go vet clean, golangci-lint clean.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (empty PipelineName, empty AppName, empty middleware Name, duplicates, unknown position)
New test follows project Gomega conventions (dot-import, NewGomegaWithT)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing validation guard pattern (early return with descriptive error)
Guard placement is consistent — at function entry before any work
No dead code or unnecessary changes

security_checklist.item: No user input reaches shell or OS calls
Pure functions with no external side effects

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is minimal — 2 lines of production code, 15 lines of test
No scope creep beyond the external reviewer's request

fail_fast_checklist.item: Empty PipelineName detected at function entry before any map allocation

defensive_checklist.item: All string-based INI section names validated for emptiness before use
